# guance_alert_policy_notice_date (Data Source)

The `guance_alert_policy_notice_date` data source reads an existing custom notice date by `uuid` or exact `name`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The exact name of the notice date.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the notice date.

### Read-Only

- `create_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource created at.
- `notice_dates` (List of String) Custom notice dates.
- `update_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource updated at.
- `workspace_uuid` (String) The UUID of the workspace.
